title: achillea millefolium subsp. lanulosa
intro: Achillea millefolium subsp. lanulosa, also known as yarrow or western yarrow, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the western regions of North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce menstrual cramps, and improve respiratory health, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and blood pressure. Achillea millefolium subsp. lanulosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
